overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from GTA V showing the character Franklin exploring a rustic lakeside dock and house. The character walks along a wooden pier, surveys the mountain lake view, ascends to a hillside house, briefly interacts with a woman on the porch, then runs along the rocky shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock extending over mountain lake

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock away from the boathouse toward the open water

entered.detail: rustic wooden shed structure on the dock with weathered planks
weathered wooden planks forming the walkway surface
calm blue mountain lake water extending to the horizon
distant forested mountains under clear blue sky
vertical wooden posts supporting the dock structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden dock extending over a calm mountain lake. A rustic boathouse sits to the left while open water and distant mountains fill the view ahead. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character moves toward the end of the pier.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock return path toward shore

events.description: character reaches the end of the dock, stops, and turns around to face the shore
character begins walking back toward the boathouse along the dock

agents.ego_description: pausing at the end of the pier to survey the view, then turning and walking back toward the shore

entered.detail: small white motorboat moored near the dock

segments.scene_description: Having reached the end of the dock, the character turns around and begins the return journey toward shore. The boathouse now appears on the right side of the frame, and a small white boat is visible moored in the water to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden stairway ascending from dock to hillside

events.description: character leaves the flat dock and begins ascending wooden stairs to the upper elevation

agents.ego_description: walking up the wooden stairs and ramps from the dock level to the house elevation above

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with railings leading up the rocky hillside
small utility shed with corrugated metal walls
tall evergreen trees on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the flat dock to a steep wooden stairway climbing the rocky hillside. The environment becomes more enclosed with trees and a corrugated metal shed appearing alongside the path.

events.description: character reaches the top of the stairs and approaches the wooden house
character approaches a woman sitting on the porch who stands up to face him

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden house with American flag, walking up to the woman on the porch

notable_agents.action: woman sitting on porch who stands up as the character approaches

entered.detail: single-story wooden house with weathered gray siding and red roof
American flag hanging on the front of the house
covered porch with brick steps and potted plants

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairs onto a dirt area in front of a rustic wooden house displaying an American flag. A woman sits on the front porch and stands up as the character approaches, creating a moment of interaction.

events.description: character breaks into a run along the rocky shoreline, passing the woman

agents.ego_description: running along the rocky shoreline away from the house, brushing past the woman

notable_agents.action: woman standing on porch watching the character run past

entered.detail: rocky and sandy terrain along the water's edge
old tire lying on the rocky ground

segments.scene_description: The character suddenly breaks into a run along the rocky lakeshore, passing the woman and leaving the house behind. The terrain becomes rough and natural with a discarded tire visible on the ground, while the lake reappears to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins on a serene lakeside pier and transitions into a rugged ascent toward a rustic hillside residence. It begins with the character walking along a narrow wooden dock toward a vista of calm water and distant mountains, before turning around to head back toward the shore past a moored white boat. As the character leaves the pier, the scene shifts from the open lake to a steep wooden stairway that climbs a rocky hillside flanked by trees and a corrugated metal shed. The path then opens onto a dirt clearing in front of a wooden house with an American flag, where the character briefly interacts with a woman standing on the porch. Finally, the camera follows as the character breaks into a run, leaving the house behind to traverse a rough, rocky shoreline littered with debris.
